message:
fix(wizard): reject whitespace-only output paths in export and deploy validation

has_output_path() only checked for empty OsStr but accepted paths like "   "
which would pass validation then fail at filesystem level. Now additionally
trims the string representation and rejects whitespace-only paths.

Adds two tests: validate_for_export_rejects_whitespace_only_output_path and
validate_for_deploy_rejects_whitespace_only_output_path.

Also updates benches/triage.rs AlertOptions construction to use ..Default
instead of listing all fields, adapting to the recently added alert fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
